html:
Exclusive to:

The Driftwood Oar is an item that can be crafted in the Seafaring Filter. It requires a Driftwood Piece to craft. Driftwood Oars only last for 400 uses but apply 1.66 times the force of a regular Oar to the Boat with each use.

Failing at rowing with a Driftwood Oar will also increase the player's Wetness by 9 and reduce its durability by 25 uses.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

Woven - Classy
Pantomimed Collection
Pantomimed Driftwood Oar
Convey an incredibly convincing impression of a driftwood oar.
Woven - Distinguished
Swamp Collection
Driftwood Paddlefish Oar
Paddle like a fish.

Trivia

  • Both types of Oars were introduced in the Turn of Tides update.
  • Oars were moved from the Think Tank to always available in the March 2022 QoL update.

Assets

Driftwood OarDriftwood Paddlefish Oar

  • Dropped

  • Dropped
  • Equipped

"oar_driftwood"
“Manual ship acceleration.”
–Wilson
“Ugh. Can it be someone else's turn to row?”
–Willow
“Oar feels so light in Wolfgang's mighty hands!”
–Wolfgang
“Just when it thought it had escaped the ocean...”
–Wendy
“ITS INCREASED EFFICIENCY DOES NOT IMPRESS ME.”
–WX-78
“A much more efficient, lighter design.”
–Wickerbottom
“Nice day for rowin', eh?. [sic]”
–Woodie
“Hmph. I've never been one for manual lab-oar.”
–Maxwell
“Back tö the sea!”
–Wigfrid
“Rowing is kinda fun!”
–Webber
“A nice, light paddle.”
–Warly
“Friend helps push water fast!”
–Wormwood
“Catch my drift? Ha!”
–Winona
“It's an oar, for shore!”
–Wortox
“Make boat go!”
–Wurt
“I used to go canoing with my Pinetree Pioneer troop.”
–Walter
“Wouldn't a sail be much faster?”
–Wanda
The Driftwood Oar is an item that can be crafted in the Seafaring Filter. It requires a Driftwood Piece to craft. Driftwood Oars only last for 400 uses but apply 1.66 times the force of a regular Oar to the Boat with each use.
Failing at rowing with a Driftwood Oar will also increase the player's Wetness by 9 and reduce its durability by 25 uses.

Oars were moved from the Think Tank to always available in the March 2022 QoL update.

Can it be someone else's turn to row? |wolfgang = Oar feels so light in Wolfgang's mighty hands! |wendy = Just when it thought it had escaped the ocean... |wx78 = ITS INCREASED EFFICIENCY DOES NOT IMPRESS ME. |wickerbottom = A much more efficient, lighter design. |woodie = Nice day for rowin', eh?. [sic] |maxwell = Hmph. I've never been one for manual lab-oar. |wigfrid = Back tö the sea! |webber = Rowing is kinda fun! |winona = Catch my drift? Ha! |warly = A nice, light paddle. |wortox = It's an oar, for shore! |wormwood = Friend helps push water fast! |wurt = Make boat go! |walter = I used to go canoing with my Pinetree Pioneer troop. |wanda = Wouldn't a sail be much faster? |choose = wickerbottom}} The '''Driftwood Oar''' is an item that can be crafted in the [[Seafaring Filter]]. It requires a [[Driftwood Piece]] to craft. Driftwood Oars only last for 400 uses but apply 1.66 times the force of a regular [[Oar]] to the [[Boat]] with each use. Failing at rowing with a Driftwood Oar will also increase the player's [[Wetness]] by 9 [[File:Wetness Meter.png|20px|text-bottom|link=Wetness]] and reduce its durability by 25 uses. == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Tools Skins|Belongings}}
